title: clematis courtoisii
intro: Clematis courtoisii, also known as the Chinese Clematis, is a flowering plant species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Clematis courtoisii include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often made into a decoction or tea, or dried and used in capsules or tablets to harness its medicinal properties.
